title: Generator carbon-monoxide boundary
summary: Place any fuel-burning generator outdoors, far from doors, windows, vents, and occupied spaces, following the manufacturer and local fire guidance.
content: Place any fuel-burning generator outdoors, far from doors, windows, vents, and occupied spaces, following the manufacturer and local fire guidance. Shut it down and move people to fresh air when carbon-monoxide alarm, headache, dizziness, nausea, confusion, or unusual sleepiness occurs. Never operate a generator in a home, garage, balcony enclosure, basement, shed, or near an opening.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Generator carbon-monoxide boundary”.
